title: Milked
description: A Social Mod based around Bonding with Others!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77121bad08262935900c5ff441e0bfd71dd99a1e.png)
### You can Milk Other Players by Right Clicking. ![main image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6b0504d3e20dd7305c76881695f43d37912608d.png) ### There is a milk meter inside the survival inventory to show how much milk you got. ![milk meter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01520c3476e206a2ebc8ff2faf989d8c4c61bd2f_0.webp) ### Milking yourself, or other people too much will kill them. ![death](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95dc2b7b30ea0c84b59c996f64983e4f862d696e.png)
